title: sesleria caerulea subsp. angustifolia
intro: Sesleria caerulea subsp. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Blue Moor-grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sesleria caerulea subsp. angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. Sesleria caerulea subsp. angustifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
